name_en: Original Fendi Latest Limited Color Embroidery Series
name_cn:
Original Fendi Latest Limited Color Embroidery Series
The 'Baguette' is an indispensable classic in the fashion world, featuring colorful interlaced embroidery on a retro background, revealing a unique flavor!
No.: 0159 Color, Size 26x13x6cm
